message:
fix: normalize paths before comparison in sync, history, validation, config

- config/mod.rs: new normalize_path_for_comparison(), parent_dirs_match(),
  resolve_without_env_jsonl(); path_is_within_beads_dir handles relative
  paths; resolve_jsonl_path takes explicit env override parameter
- sync/history.rs: normalize_target_path_lexically() prevents duplicate
  backup entries from non-canonical paths with .. segments
- sync/path.rs: resolve_symlink_target() joins relative targets with
  link parent before canonicalizing; is_sync_path_allowed simplified
- validation/mod.rs: rewrite validate_path_containment() to delegate to
  config::resolved_jsonl_path_is_external(); distinguish "traverses
  outside" vs "is outside" error messages
- history.rs (CLI): delegate to config for external check; new
  jsonl_targets_match() with three-tier comparison; restore commands
  include --db flag and use BIN_NAME
- where.rs: compare canonicalized source vs final dir to avoid false
  redirect reports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
